issues.title: Large fallen tree completely blocks two-lane road
issues.description: A massive tree trunk has fallen horizontally across a two-lane asphalt road, completely cutting off vehicular access in both directions. The trunk spans the entire road surface and shoulders, making it impossible for vehicles to pass.
issues.estimatedSize: approx 10 meters long and 1 meter wide
issues.publicRisk: High risk of high-speed vehicular collisions, complete blockage of traffic, and obstruction of emergency vehicle access.

timeline.remarks: Report submitted. Autonomous department routing mapped to Roads Department. Urgent verification requests dispatched.

comments.text: I walked past this morning, and the potholes have indeed expanded. High collision risk indeed!
Road repair crew has assigned the asphalt patch. Will update once the roller is on site.

predictions.area: Sunset District (Around Haight St & Cole St)
predictions.recommendation: Inspect underground 12-inch water mains along Cole St. The current telemetry and rapid reporting sequence points to an active structural joint failure under the sidewalk.
Establish automated CCTV surveillance and schedule secondary municipal sweeps at 11 PM daily. High correlations with commercial food waste overflow patterns.
Pre-emptively trim eucalyptus trees along Outer Geary. Historical storm wind directions show these trees are subject to shear forces leading to rapid branch snaps.
